payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial vertical crop of a dark reddish-brown wooden cabinet with glossy finish, raised carved panels and molding, a small upper drawer with a round metal knob and a decorative base plinth; object is edge-cropped and photographed from close range (≈0.8 m).
